# Component Contribution Template

Use this template when contributing a new component or updating an existing one. The `scripts/generate-component-contribution.js` can populate a starting file into `contributions/<component>-CONTRIBUTION.md`.

Sections:
- Summary
- Example Markup
- Styles
- Scripts
- Accessibility Checklist
- Changelog / Metadata
- Contribution Notes

Follow repository conventions for naming, metadata (`data/components.json`), and add tests / visual snapshots where applicable.
